title: Author Correction: Root microbiota drive direct integration of phosphate stress and immunity
author: Gabriel Castrillo
fullText:
Author Correction
 
 

 Published: 02 March 2026
 

 
 Paulo José Pereira Lima Teixeira1,2 na1, Sur Herrera Paredes1,2,3 na1, Theresa F. Law1,2, Laura de Lorenzo4 nAff10, Meghan E. Feltcher1,2, Omri M. Finkel1,2, Natalie W. Breakfield1,2 nAff11, Piotr Mieczkowski5,6,7, Corbin D. Jones1,3,5,6,7,8, Javier Paz-Ares4 & …Jeffery L. Dangl1,2,3,7,8,9 

 

 
 
 Nature

 (2026)Cite this article
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 

 
 
 

 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Correction to: Nature https://doi.org/10.1038/nature21417 Published online 15 March 2017In the originally published version of this article, Extended Data Fig. 6c was inadvertently labelled as Col-0, although it shows the phosphate starvation reporter line IPS1–GUS in Col-0 background from the same experiment as Extended Data Fig. 5c. This error occurred during figure preparation. Due to the age of the article, the image cannot be updated directly; the corrected Extended Data Fig. 6c is now provided below (Fig. 1). This correction does not affect the results or conclusions of the study.Fig. 1Corrected Extended Data Fig. 6c.Full size image
